title: polypodium heterolepis
intro: Polypodium heterolepis, also known as the rattlesnake fern or Virginia chain fern, is a species of fern native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium heterolepis include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to improve immune function and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
